subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 20/25] server41tests: test cross-directory rename REMOVE notification

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite to verify that when renaming a file across directories, the source directory's delegation receives a NOTIFY4_REMOVE_ENTRY notification instead of a NOTIFY4_RENAME_ENTRY notification. The test creates a delegated directory, a target directory, and then renames a file from the delegated directory to the target directory using a separate client session.
